title: Last Nigt on Earth
description: Probably by the time you got here you didn't know what were you doing here, but now you know, you hear strange noises, see strange things and feel something you've never felt before. You feel like this is your last night on the planet Earth.
body:
Heavily inspired from the famous modpack [Fear Nightfall](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fear-nightfall). 

The story is simple, you didn't even know how you got here, the last thing you remember was a name, **Herobrine**, you thought he was a fake legend. But he isn't, because now you know something isn't right, you hear and see strange things, but don't even know what's happening. The only thing you know is that this is probably your last night on this planet before he gets you.



This Forge modpack features interesting & incredible mods like:

- [Alex's mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs): New 89 mobs, including real-life creatures and fantasy ones.
- [Alex's caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves): 5 new cave biomes, adding a new look to Minecraft's underground territories.
- [Yung's Better mods](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG): These mods overhaul completely most Minecraft structures, making them feel like a different game.
- [From the Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog): LunaPixel made a great job making a lore faithful Herobrine mod, a famous Herobrine recreation, making it one of the main mods of this modpack.
- [Dark Waters](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-waters): If you ever encounter a storm while on the sea, take care and pray so you don't get caught by whatever's below the waters.
- [Ambient Sounds 6](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds): Classic Minecraft sound-overhauling mod that will add a completely different atmosphere from Minecraft vanilla.

This modpack wouldn't be near similar without this beautiful medieval texture pack: [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen)

And obviously this horror-inspired shaders: [Hysteria](https://modrinth.com/shader/hysteria-shaders)
